name: Yoga Sadhana
description: A traditional yoga studio in the heart of Tiong Bahru, Singapore. Founded by Master Sumit with over 20 years of practice, Yoga Sadhana offers group classes, specialised workshops, and private sessions rooted in Hatha, Ashtanga, and Vinyasa traditions. Whether you are stepping on the mat for the first time or deepening an existing practice, our instructors meet you where you are.
shortDescription: Traditional yoga classes, workshops & private sessions in Tiong Bahru

name: Clay & Co Pottery
description: A creative pottery studio offering wheel-throwing, hand-building, and glazing workshops. Perfect for date nights, team bonding, or solo creative time. All materials included — just bring your imagination. Our experienced potters guide you through every step, from centering clay to finishing your masterpiece.

name: The Kitchen Lab
description: Hands-on cooking classes covering cuisines from around the world. From Japanese ramen to Italian pasta-making, our professional chef instructors teach techniques you can replicate at home. Classes include all ingredients, recipes, and of course — you get to eat what you cook!
shortDescription: Hands-on cooking classes — cuisines from around the world

name: Rhythm Academy
description: Group music lessons and jam sessions for guitar, drums, piano, and vocals. Our classes are designed for adults who want to pick up an instrument or improve their skills in a fun, social environment. No experience needed — just a love for music.
shortDescription: Group music lessons — guitar, drums, piano & vocals

name: Zen Wellness Centre
description: A holistic wellness centre offering meditation, sound healing, and mindfulness workshops. Our serene space in Holland Village is designed to help you disconnect from the noise and reconnect with yourself. Led by certified practitioners with years of experience.

name: Code Camp SG
description: Weekend coding workshops for beginners and intermediate learners. Learn Python, JavaScript, data science, and web development in small, interactive group sessions. Our instructors are industry professionals who break down complex concepts into practical, project-based lessons.
shortDescription: Weekend coding workshops — Python, JavaScript & more
